headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.anthropic.com; frame-src https://www.youtube.com; media-src 'self' blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:; img-src 'self' data: blob:; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests;
